lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਿਭੂਤਾ ਸਿੰਙੀ ਨਾਦੁ ਵਜਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaaveh taa kareh bibhootaa singee naad vajaaveh |
lines.english: When it pleases You, we smear our bodies with ashes, and blow the horn and the conch shell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਪੜਹਿ ਕਤੇਬਾ ਮੁਲਾ ਸੇਖ ਕਹਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai taa parreh katebaa mulaa sekh kahaaveh |
lines.english: When it pleases You, we read the Islamic Scriptures, and are acclaimed as Mullahs and Shaykhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਰਸ ਕਸ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai taa hoveh raaje ras kas bahut kamaaveh |
lines.english: When it pleases You, we become kings, and enjoy all sorts of tastes and pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੇਗ ਵਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਿਰ ਮੁੰਡੀ ਕਟਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai teg vagaaveh sir munddee katt jaaveh |
lines.english: When it pleases You, we wield the sword, and cut off the heads of our enemies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਨਾਇ ਰਚਾਵਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਤੂੰ ਭਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai naae rachaaveh tudh bhaane toon bhaaveh |
lines.english: When it pleases You, we are attuned to the Name, and when it pleases You, we become pleasing to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਜਾਹਿ ਦਿਸੰਤਰਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਗਲਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tudh bhaavai jaeh disantar sun galaa ghar aaveh |
lines.english: When it pleases You, we go out to foreign lands; hearing news of home, we come back again.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਏਕ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਹੋਰਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ek kahai benantee hor sagale koorr kamaaveh |1|
lines.english: Nanak utters this one prayer; everything else is just the practice of falsehood. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਵਡਾ ਸਭਿ ਵਡਿਆਂਈਆ ਚੰਗੈ ਚੰਗਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa toon vaddaa sabh vaddiaaneea changai changaa hoee |
lines.english: You are so Great-all Greatness flows from You. You are So Good-Goodness radiates from You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਸਚਾ ਕੂੜਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa toon sachaa taa sabh ko sachaa koorraa koe na koee |
lines.english: You are True-all that flows from You is True. Nothing at all is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣੁ ਵੇਖਣੁ ਬੋਲਣੁ ਚਲਣੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਧਾਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan vekhan bolan chalan jeevan maranaa dhaat |
lines.english: Talking, seeing, speaking, walking, living and dying-all these are transitory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਾਜਿ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਰਖੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਆਪਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hukam saaj hukamai vich rakhai naanak sachaa aap |2|
lines.english: By the Hukam of His Command, He creates, and in His Command, He keeps us. O Nanak, He Himself is True. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਨਿਸੰਗੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev nisang bharam chukaaeeai |
lines.english: Serve the True Guru fearlessly, and your doubt shall be dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur hoe deaal ta naam dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: When the True Guru becomes merciful, we meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਖੈ ਕਾਰ ਸੁ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: satigur aakhai kaar su kaar kamaaeeai |
lines.english: Do that work which the True Guru asks you to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਸੁ ਸਾਰੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa bhagat su saar guramukh paaeeai |
lines.english: The profit of devotional worship is excellent. It is obtained by the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਦੈ ਦਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਸਚੁ ਚਵਾਂਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sache dai dar jaae sach chavaaneeai |
lines.english: Go to the Gate of Truth, and speak the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh koorr gubaar koorr kamaaeeai |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are trapped in the darkness of falsehood; they practice nothing but falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sach sadaa sachiaar sach samaaeeai |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the true ones are forever true; they are absorbed in the True Lord. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲਿ ਸਚਿ ਬੁਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sachai andar mehal sach bulaaeeai |
lines.english: The True Lord calls the true ones to the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਅਮਾਵਸ ਸਚੁ ਚੰਦ੍ਰਮਾ ਦੀਸੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਹ ਚੜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: koorr amaavas sach chandramaa deesai naahee keh charriaa |
lines.english: In this dark night of falsehood, the moon of Truth is not visible anywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕਾਤੀ ਰਾਜੇ ਕਾਸਾਈ ਧਰਮੁ ਪੰਖ ਕਰਿ ਉਡਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kal kaatee raaje kaasaaee dharam pankh kar uddariaa |
lines.english: The Dark Age of Kali Yuga is the knife, and the kings are butchers; righteousness has sprouted wings and flown away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਭਾਲਿ ਵਿਕੁੰਨੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: hau bhaal vikunee hoee |
lines.english: I have searched in vain, and I am so confused;

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਧੇਰੈ ਰਾਹੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aadherai raahu na koee |
lines.english: In this darkness, I cannot find the path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਰੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: vich haumai kar dukh roee |
lines.english: In egotism, they cry out in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kin bidh gat hoee |1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, how will they be saved? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kal keerat paragatt chaanan sansaar |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise has appeared as a Light in the world.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare tis devai |
lines.english: The Lord bestows His Glance of Grace;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੋਈ ਉਤਰੈ ਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh koee utarai paar |
lines.english: How rare are those few Gurmukhs who swim across to the other side!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਸੋ ਲੇਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ratan so levai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh receives the jewel. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਤੈ ਸੈਸਾਰੀਆ ਜੋੜੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa tai saisaareea jorr kade na aaeaa |
lines.english: Between the Lord's devotees and the people of the world, there can never be any true alliance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਅਭੁਲੁ ਹੈ ਨ ਭੁਲੈ ਕਿਸੈ ਦਾ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: karataa aap abhul hai na bhulai kisai daa bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: The Creator Himself is infallible. He cannot be fooled; no one can fool Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿਅਨੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat aape melian jinee sacho sach kamaaeaa |
lines.english: He blends His devotees with Himself; they practice Truth, and only Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੈਸਾਰੀ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇਅਨੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saisaaree aap khuaaeian jinee koorr bol bol bikh khaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself leads the people of the world astray; they tell lies, and by telling lies, they eat poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਕਰਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਜਿਨੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat karan har chaakaree jinee anadin naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: The devotees serve the Lord; night and day, they meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਣ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਕਾਮੁ ਕਰੋਧੁ ਵਿਸੁ ਵਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chalan saar na jaananee kaam karodh vis vadhaaeaa |
lines.english: They do not recognize the ultimate reality, that we all must go; they continue to cultivate the poisons of sexual desire and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਖਸਮੈ ਕੈ ਦਰਿ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: onaa khasamai kai dar mukh ujale sachai sabad suhaaeaa |16|
lines.english: In the Court of their Lord and Master, their faces are radiant; they are embellished and exalted with the True Word of the Shabad. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਜਿਨੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: daasan daas hoe kai jinee vichahu aap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Becoming the slaves of the Lord's slaves, they eradicate selfishness and conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਾਹੀ ਸਾਲਾਹ ਜਿਨੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabaahee saalaah jinee dhiaaeaa ik man |
lines.english: Those who praise the Lord in the early hours of the morning and meditate on Him single-mindedly,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਬਹੁਤੇ ਰਾਹ ਮਨ ਕੀਆ ਮਤੀ ਖਿੰਡੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bahute raah man keea matee khinddeea |
lines.english: In the second watch, the focus of the mind is scattered in all sorts of ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਪਏ ਅਸਗਾਹ ਗੋਤੇ ਖਾਹਿ ਨ ਨਿਕਲਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bahut pe asagaah gote khaeh na nikaleh |
lines.english: So many fall into the bottomless pit; they are dragged under, and they cannot get out again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਾਹ ਵਖਤੈ ਉਪਰਿ ਲੜਿ ਮੁਏ ॥
lines.translit: seee poore saah vakhatai upar larr mue |
lines.english: are the perfect kings; at the right time, they die fighting.
